channel.title: mycatalog updates
channel.description: 'My Catalog' uses the IBM Cloud catalog API to retrieve data from the catalog. It attempts to be as accurate as possible. This feed shows additions, updates, removals from the catalog. Use with care. It is a work-in-progress :)

item.title: [updated] Wasabi AiR (wasabi-air) has changed the description of the plan named paygo
item.description:
*before*: Pay As You Go Plan : Wasabi AiR ($12.99 / AiR hour) + Wasabi Cloud Storage ($8.99 / TB / mo) with Wasabi Premium Support., *after*: Pay As You Go Plan : Wasabi AiR ($12.99 / AiR hour) + Wasabi Cloud Storage ($8.99 / TB / mo) with Wasabi Premium Support.
Pricing is based on GB per day. Based on 30-day month, formula for cost estimator: TiB × 1024 × 30 = GB-days.
Example: For 100 TiB of storage, enter 100 x 1024 x 30 =3,072,000 GB-days
For more information please reach out to ibm@wasabi.com

item.title: [updated] Wasabi Hot Cloud Storage (wasabi-cloud-storage) has changed the description of the plan named pay-as-you-go
item.description:
*before*: Pay As You Go Plan : Wasabi Cloud Storage ($6.99 / TB / mo) plus Wasabi Premium Support, *after*: Pay As You Go Plan : Wasabi Cloud Storage ($6.99 / TB / mo) plus Wasabi Premium Support
Pricing is based on GB per day.
Based on 30-day month, formula for cost estimator: TiB × 1024 × 30 = GB-days.
Example: For 100 TiB of storage, enter 100 x 1024 x 30 =3,072,000 GB-days
For more information please reach out to ibm@wasabi.com
